2606.29972.title: First-Order Temporal Logic Tensor Networks
2606.29972.paper_summary: Most of the existing neuro-symbolic AI methods focus on the scenario of static knowledge where objects do not change according to a temporal dimension. Temporal neuro-symbolic works are still under explored and are mainly developed for time-interval logic or propositional linear temporal logic. There is a lack of models studying linear temporal logics with predicates that deal with objects whose properties and relations change through the time. We present First-Order Temporal Logic Tensor Networks (FOT-LTN) that is an extension of Logic Tensor Networks (LTN) that fills this gap by considering a linear-temporal dimension. In particular, FOT-LTN joins the syntax of First-Order Linear Temporal Logic with the fuzzy (and real-valued) semantics of LTN obtaining a framework that supports both temporal operators and quantifiers and is totally differentiable. A first evaluation regards a temporal knowledge graph completion task on two synthetic datasets showing better performance of FOT-LTN with respect to dedicated (purely neural) methods.
2606.29972.paper_summary_zh: 大多數現有的神經符號 AI 方法專注於靜態知識的情境，其中物體不會根據時間維度而改變。<lb/>時間神經符號的研究仍然不夠深入，主要是針對時間區間邏輯或命題線性時間邏輯進行開發。<lb/>目前缺乏研究線性時間邏輯的模型，這些模型涉及隨時間變化的物體的性質和關係。<lb/>我們提出了第一階段時間邏輯張量網絡（FOT-LTN），這是邏輯張量網絡（LTN）的擴展，通過考慮線性時間維度來填補這一空白。<lb/>特別地，FOT-LTN 將第一階段線性時間邏輯的語法與 LTN 的模糊（和實值）語義結合，獲得了一個支持時間運算符和量詞的框架，並且是完全可微的。<lb/>第一次評估涉及在兩個合成數據集上進行時間知識圖譜補全任務，顯示 FOT-LTN 相對於專用（純神經）方法的性能更佳。
2606.29972.author: Luca Boscarato et.al.
2606.29972.authors: Luca Boscarato, Ivan Donadello, Alessandro Artale, Marco Montali, Fabrizio Maria Maggi
